ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the location */,
  "type_of_space_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of space */,
  "security" TEXT /* Security measures in place (e.g., No, Yes) */,
  "demarcation" TEXT /* Whether the location is demarcated (e.g., Demarcated, Not demarcated) */,
  "cleanliness" TEXT /* Cleanliness status of the location (e.g., Clean, Not clean) */,
  "seating_types" TEXT /* Types of seating available (e.g., Fixed, None) */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum seating capacity of the location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the location information was last updated */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the public space (in square meters or square feet) */,
  "entrances" INTEGER /* Number of entrances */,
  "exits" INTEGER /* Number of exits */,
  "cctv_cameras" INTEGER /* Presence of CCTV cameras */,
  "images" TEXT /* Images or videos of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_security FOREIGN KEY ("security") REFERENCES security_measures ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_cleanliness FOREIGN KEY ("cleanliness") REFERENCES cleanliness ("cleanliness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_seating_types FOREIGN KEY ("seating_types") REFERENCES seating_types ("seating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_type_of_space_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_of_space_id") REFERENCES types_of_spaces ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_demarcation FOREIGN KEY ("demarcation") REFERENCES demarcation ("demarcation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types_of_spaces" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of space */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type of space */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type of space */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_measures" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security measure */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security measure */,
  "security_details" TEXT /* Details of the security measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demarcation" (
  "demarcation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demarcation status */,
  "demarcation_name" TEXT /* Name of the demarcation status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demarcation status */,
  "demarcation_details" TEXT /* Details of the demarcation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demarcation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cleanliness" (
  "cleanliness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleanliness status */,
  "cleanliness_name" TEXT /* Name of the cleanliness status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cleanliness status */,
  "cleanliness_details" TEXT /* Details of the cleanliness status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleanliness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seating_types" (
  "seating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seating type */,
  "seating_name" TEXT /* Name of the seating type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seating type */,
  "seating_details" TEXT /* Details of the seating type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electrical_appliances" (
  "appliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electrical appliance */,
  "location_id" TEXT /* ID of the location where the appliance is installed */,
  "appliance_name" TEXT /* Name of the electrical appliance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appliance (e.g., Working, Broken) */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date the appliance was last inspected */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the appliance */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the appliance */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the appliance was installed */,
  "images" TEXT /* Images or videos of the appliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electrical_appliances_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ornaments_and_decorations" (
  "ornament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ornament or decoration */,
  "location_id" TEXT /* ID of the location where the ornament is installed */,
  "ornament_name" TEXT /* Name of the ornament or decoration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ornament (e.g., Good, Damaged) */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date the ornament was last inspected */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the ornament */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the ornament */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the ornament was installed */,
  "images" TEXT /* Images or videos of the ornament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ornament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ornaments_and_decorations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance task */,
  "location_id" TEXT /* ID of the location where the task is to be performed */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance task (e.g., Cleaning, Repair) */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date the task is scheduled */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the task was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., High, Low) */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the task */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the task */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_tasks_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reported issue */,
  "location_id" TEXT /* ID of the location where the issue was reported */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., Litter, Broken Furniture) */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., High, Low) */,
  "resolution_steps" TEXT /* Steps taken to resolve the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Maintenance Staff, City Official, Public User) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "location_id" TEXT /* ID of the public space being accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the space */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the space was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the space */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
